title: App: DEF CON Confessions - Anonymous mesh board
description:
## Overview

Anonymous message board over mesh. Type on phone, appears on big screen. No accounts, no logs, no tracking.

## Features

### Post a confession
- Phone connects to your T-Echo via BLE
- Simple web app: text box + submit
- Message goes: phone → BLE → node → LoRa → gateway → screen
- No sender ID attached (truly anonymous)

### Big screen feed
- Messages scroll up, newest at bottom
- Auto-expire after 10 minutes (RAM only)
- Optional: upvote from any node, hot messages stay longer

### E-ink display
- Your node shows last N messages from the feed
- Scroll with button
- Or: show only messages with specific hashtag

### Moderation
- Gateway can filter keywords (slurs, etc.)
- No delete capability (that would require tracking who sent what)
- Rate limit: 1 message per node per 30 sec

## Protocol

### Phone → Node (BLE)
```json
{"type": "confession", "text": "I use spaces not tabs"}
```

### Node → Gateway (CoAP)
POST /confessions
```json
{"text": "I use spaces not tabs", "ts": 1234567890}
```
Note: NO source ID in the payload

### Gateway → Dashboard
Broadcast to all connected browsers via WebSocket

## Privacy

- Gateway does not log source node
- Messages stored in RAM only, 10 min TTL
- No analytics, no tracking
- Post-event: nothing to subpoena
close_reason: Updated CoAP server docs and Kconfig for /confessions per bead description; started anonymous board support
